subject: FW: Invitation for Jeffrey Epstein
body:

Subject: Invitation for Jeffrey Epstein

 

Hi Lesley,

Attached is the invitation, please let me know if he is able to attend
next week!

 

 

SAM AND ABY

INVITE YOU TO A PARTY

 

THURSDAY, MAY FIFTEENTH

NINE O'CLOCK

 

22 EAST 71st STREET

NEW YORK CITY

 

 

 

All Best,

Eunice Kim
